description: Experience the perfect combination of style, performance, and advanced technology with this Black 2025 Mazda CX-30 AWD 2.5 S Preferred SUV. Powered by a responsive SKYACTIV-G 2.5L I4 engine with a 6-speed shiftable automatic transmission and on-demand AWD, this CX-30 is ready for any road. Enjoy premium features like a power moonroof, heated front seats, leatherette upholstery, and an 8.8-inch MAZDA CONNECT infotainment system with Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and Amazon Alexa integration. Stay connected and in control with MyMazda smart app compatibility for remote engine start, lock/unlock, vehicle location, and maintenance scheduling. Safety is prioritized with adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, front and pedestrian emergency braking, rear cross traffic alert, blind spot monitoring, and a rearview camera. Additional highlights include rain-sensing wipers, dual-zone automatic climate control, split folding rear seats, and advanced driver attention alerts. If you're searching for a sporty and versatile SUV with the latest in comfort, safety, and connectivity, this 2025 Mazda CX-30 delivers. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Wireless Android Auto/Apple CarPlay smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  This Mazda CX-90 has a Mazda Certified Warranty!  Mazda's Certified Pre-Owned program is built to deliver confidence and peace of mind while offering exceptional value. Each Mazda CPO vehicle must pass a rigorous multi-point inspection performed by factory-trained technicians, ensuring it meets Mazda's high standards for quality, safety, and performance. Every vehicle also includes a detailed vehicle history report, giving buyers full transparency before they purchase.  To further protect your investment, Mazda Certified Pre-Owned vehicles come with a 12-month/12,000-mile limited vehicle warranty and an extended 7-year/100,000-mile powertrain warranty from the original in-service date. Buyers also receive 24-hour roadside assistance for added convenience and security, making Mazda CPO an excellent choice for those who want near-new reliability with the savings of a pre-owned vehicle. Mini Spare Wheel with Spare Tire ($345 value)    Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. description: This 2025 Honda Ridgeline TrailSport+, has a  Crystal Black Pearl exterior and a Black w/ Orange Stitching interior color. 2,915 miles.  Stock Number PD009946  WHY THIS VEHICLE?     Important Package Information HPD Wheel and All-Terrain Tire Package ($1,900 value)Includes 18-in. HPD alloy wheels, black lug nuts, and all-terrain tires. Convenience Distance pacing cruise control - Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.   Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. GMC delivers impressive driver assistance for safety and functionality with a ProGrade Trailering System, an HD rearview camera, automatic braking, lane-departure warning, forward collision warning, trailer sway control, stability/traction control, hitch guidance with hitch view, and more. When tough jobs call, our Sierra 2500 SLT is ready to answer! Save this Page and Call for Availability. We Know You Will Enjoy Your Test Drive Towards Ownership! description: The 2025 Honda CR-V LX 2WD is a remarkable vehicle that combines functionality, safety, and advanced technology, making it an excellent choice for families and individuals alike. With its powerful 1.5L I-4 gasoline direct injection engine delivering 190HP and a CVT transmission, the CR-V LX ensures a smooth and responsive driving experience.One of the standout features of the 2025 Honda CR-V LX 2WD is its **Smart device mirroring** capability. This innovative technology allows drivers to seamlessly connect their smartphones to the vehicles infotainment system, enhancing the overall driving experience by keeping distractions to a minimum. You can access essential apps and navigation without taking your eyes off the road.Another impressive feature is the **Hands-on steering assist/lane centering** system. This advanced technology takes the stress out of long drives by maintaining a safe distance from surrounding vehicles and ensuring you stay centered in your lane. Simply set your desired speed, and let the CR-V LX do the rest!Safety is a top priority in the 2025 Honda CR-V LX. The **Forward collision mitigation** system actively monitors the road ahead to detect potential collisions and will take preventative measures to reduce the severity of an accident. Additionally, the **Front pedestrian impact prevention** feature enhances safety by identifying pedestrians and taking steps to avoid collisions.The **Rear camera** is another essential feature, providing enhanced visibility of obstacles and hazards behind the vehicle. This extra set of eyes ensures that you can reverse safely, making it easier to navigate tight parking spaces or driveways.Moreover, the **Lane departure prevention** system is designed to help you maintain your lane, providing corrective actions if you unintentionally drift. This feature, combined with **Adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go**, makes highway driving more manageable by adjusting your speed according to the flow of traffic.The **Brake assist** feature comes in handy during emergency situations, automatically applying maximum braking power when it detects a sudden stop. Meanwhile, **Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls** lets you set and maintain your speed effortlessly, enhancing driving comfort and efficiency.Lastly, the **Touchscreen** interface simplifies access to various functions, making it intuitive and user-friendly. With the 2025 Honda CR-V LX 2WD, you can experience a blend of safety, comfort, and modern technology, making every journey enjoyable.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Turbocharged,Front Wheel Drive,Power Steering,ABS,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,Brake Assist,Wheel Covers,Steel Wheels,Tires - Front All-Season,Tires - Rear All-Season,Wheel Covers,Temporary Spare Tire,Power Mirror(s),Integrated Turn Signal Mirrors,Rear Defrost,Intermittent Wipers,Variable Speed Intermittent Wipers,Rear Spoiler,Power Door Locks,Daytime Running Lights,Automatic Headlights,LED Headlights,Automatic Highbeams,AM/FM Stereo,MP3 Capability,Bluetooth Connection,Auxiliary Audio Input,Smart Device Integration,MP3 Capability,Steering Wheel Audio Controls,Bluetooth Connection,Bucket Seats,Pass-Through Rear Seat,Rear Bench Seat,Adjustable Steering Wheel,Trip Computer,Power Windows,Keyless Start,Keyless Entry,Power Door Locks,Cruise Control,Adaptive Cruise Control,Climate Control,A/C,Cloth Seats,Driver Vanity Mirror,Passenger Vanity Mirror,Floor Mats,Keyless Start,Smart Device Integration,Power Windows,Power Door Locks,Trip Computer,Security System,Immobilizer,Cruise Control Steering Assist,Traction Control,Stability Control,Traction Control,Front Side Air Bag,Lane Departure Warning,Lane Keeping Assist,Lane Departure Warning,Front Collision Mitigation,Driver Monitoring,Tire Pressure Monitor,Driver Air Bag,Passenger Air Bag,Front Head Air Bag,Rear Head Air Bag,Passenger Air Bag Sensor,Front Side Air Bag,Rear Side Air Bag,Knee Air Bag,Child Safety Locks,Back-Up Camera

description: The 2025 Honda CR-V EX-L AWD stands out in the SUV market with its advanced features and cutting-edge technology. This vehicle combines a powerful 1.5L I-4 gasoline direct injection engine, delivering an impressive 190HP with a smooth CVT transmission to provide a driving experience that is both exhilarating and efficient.One of the key highlights of the CR-V EX-L AWD is its **hands-on steering assist/lane centering** feature, which acts as your ultimate co-pilot. This technology allows for hands-on cruise control, enabling a stress-free road trip by maintaining a safe distance from other vehicles while keeping you centered in your lane.Safety is paramount in the 2025 Honda CR-V, as evidenced by the **forward collision mitigation** system. This proactive feature senses potential impacts and activates necessary measures to help prevent or lessen the severity of accidents, ensuring peace of mind while on the road.Another notable safety feature is the **front pedestrian impact prevention** system. It continuously monitors the road ahead, identifying pedestrians and taking preventive actions to avoid collisions. This extra layer of safety is essential in urban environments where pedestrian traffic is high.Additionally, the **rear camera** enhances your awareness of obstacles behind you, offering a clearer view that improves safety while reversing. The **lane departure prevention** feature further ensures that you remain safely within your lane, taking corrective action if you unintentionally veer off course.Rear safety is reinforced with the **rear collision mitigation** system, which uses sensors to monitor the area behind you, preparing for potential rear-end collisions. The **adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go** feature offers a modern twist on traditional cruise control by automatically adjusting your speed according to traffic conditions, making long drives more comfortable.For quick stops and starts, the **brake assist** feature is a lifesaver, applying maximum power during emergency braking situations to prevent accidents in critical moments. The **cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls** allows for effortless speed adjustments, enhancing driving comfort and reducing fatigue on long journeys.Finally, the **power open and close liftgate** adds convenience, allowing you to access the cargo area effortlessly, especially when your hands are full.In summary, the 2025 Honda CR-V EX-L AWD is a remarkable vehicle that seamlessly blends performance, safety, and convenience, making it an outstanding choice for drivers seeking a reliable SUV.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Turbocharged,All Wheel Drive,Power Steering,ABS,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,Brake Assist,Aluminum Wheels,Tires - description: Experience luxury and innovation with this stunning silver 2025 Lexus RX 350 Premium 4dr SUV. Powered by a responsive 2.4L Turbo I4 engine paired with an 8-speed shiftable automatic transmission and Front-Wheel Drive, this RX delivers a smooth, confident ride. Enjoy advanced safety with adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, front & rear automatic emergency braking, pedestrian detection, blind spot monitoring, and rear cross traffic alert. Stay connected and entertained with the Lexus Interface infotainment system, a 9.8-inch touchscreen, wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant compatibility, and Wi-Fi hotspot. description: This  2025 SUBARU CROSSTREK , has a WHITE exterior and  interior color with only 13,143 miles.  Stock Number 66752A. You can connect  with us by calling 781-246-3331.     No Accidents!  One Owner!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Standard Model    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics STARLINK/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring MySubaru/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring     At Albrecht Subaru of Wakefield, we're here to Serve you!  Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process.  With our live market pricing philosophy, we offer the right cars at the right price, and the transparency to back it up!

Cloaked in an elegant Onyx Black exterior with a refined Blond Leather interior, this luxury wagon is a rare find in the Bethesda, Washington DC, and Northern Virginia markets. Designed for those who demand more than a standard SUV, the V60 Cross Country features increased ground clearance, black wheel arch cladding, and a unique Cross Country mesh grille, making it as capable on a weekend trip to the Shenandoah as it is polished for an evening in Georgetown., Performance is driven by a 2.0L Turbocharged engine paired with a 48V Mild Hybrid system, delivering a smooth 247 HP while maximizing efficiency during stop-and-go commutes on I-270 or the Beltway. The standard All-Wheel Drive system and advanced Electronic Stability Control ensure peak performance in all weather conditions. This specific model has been upgraded with 19-inch 5-Double Spoke Matte Graphite Diamond Cut Wheels, providing an aggressive yet upscale stance that sets it apart from the crowd in the Maryland and DC metro area, The interior is a sanctuary of luxury and high-tech convenience, featuring a Laminated Panoramic Sunroof and genuine leather upholstery. The Plus trim includes the highly sought-after Pilot Assist Driver Assistance System with Adaptive Cruise Control, significantly reducing driver fatigue during heavy Washington DC traffic. Tech enthusiasts will appreciate the Google built-in ecosystem, featuring native Google Maps, Assistant, and Play Store, along with Apple CarPlay and a high-performance audio system. The included Climate Package adds essential warmth for East Coast winters with heated seating and advanced climate controls., Safety remains paramount with Volvos legendary suite of protection, including BLIS (Blind Spot Information System) with Steer Assist, Cross Traffic Alert, and a comprehensive Collision Avoidance system that detects pedestrians, cyclists, and large animals. As a Certified Pre-Owned vehicle, this V60 Cross Country has passed a meticulous inspection to ensure it meets the highest standards. Experience the ultimate versatile luxury vehicleperfect for the active lifestyles of Bethesda and Montgomery County residentsand enjoy the peace of mind that comes with Volvos world-class engineering. description: The 2025 Honda CR-V LX 2WD is a standout vehicle that combines efficiency, safety, and innovative technology, making it an excellent choice for drivers seeking a reliable SUV. Its robust 1.5L I-4 gasoline direct injection engine delivers an impressive 190 horsepower, paired with a smooth continuously variable transmission CVT for a seamless driving experience.One of the top features of the Honda CR-V LX is **Smart device mirroring**, which allows drivers to connect their smartphones seamlessly with the vehicles infotainment system. This feature enhances safety by enabling drivers to control their devices without taking their eyes off the road. The integration of technology into the driving experience is further exemplified by the **Touchscreen** control panel, which provides intuitive access to essential vehicle functions at the touch of a finger.Safety is paramount in the 2025 Honda CR-V LX, as seen in its **Forward collision mitigation** system. This advanced feature activates when an impending impact is detected, helping to prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Additionally, the **Front pedestrian impact prevention** system monitors the road ahead for pedestrians, ensuring that the vehicle can take action to avoid potential collisions. These features work together to create a safer driving environment for both the driver and pedestrians.Another remarkable safety feature is **Lane departure prevention**, which uses sensors to keep the vehicle within its designated lane, providing an extra layer of security during long drives. The **Adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go** feature takes the stress out of highway driving by automatically adjusting speed based on the traffic flow, making road trips more enjoyable and less tiring.The **Rear camera** is a practical addition, making it easier for drivers to navigate tight spaces and avoid obstacles while reversing. This is complemented by **Brake assist**, which enhances stopping power in emergency situations, ensuring that drivers can react swiftly to unexpected hazards.In summary, the 2025 Honda CR-V LX 2WD is a perfect blend of functionality and safety, featuring state-of-the-art technology and a powerful engine. With its comprehensive suite of safety features, including adaptive cruise control and collision mitigation systems, this vehicle is designed to provide peace of mind on every journey. Whether commuting in the city or embarking on a weekend adventure, the Honda CR-V LX is ready to deliver a top-notch driving experience.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Turbocharged,Front Wheel Drive,Power Steering,ABS,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,Brake Assist,Wheel Covers,Steel Wheels,Tires - Front All-Season,Tires - Rear All-Season,Wheel Covers,Temporary Spare Tire,Power Mirror(s),Integrated Turn Signal Mirrors,Rear Defrost,Intermittent Wipers,Variable Speed Intermittent Wipers,Rear Spoiler,Power Door Locks,Daytime Running Lights,Automatic Headlights,LED Headlights,Automatic Highbeams,AM/FM Stereo,MP3 Capability,Bluetooth Connection,Auxiliary Audio Input,Smart Device Integration,MP3 Capability,Steering Wheel Audio Controls,Bluetooth Connection,Bucket Seats,Pass-Through Rear Seat,Rear Bench Seat,Adjustable Steering Wheel,Trip Computer,Power Windows,Keyless Start,Keyless Entry,Power Door Locks,Cruise Control,Adaptive Cruise Control,Climate Control,A/C,Cloth Seats,Driver Vanity Mirror,Passenger Vanity Mirror,Floor Mats,Keyless Start,Smart Device Integration,Power Windows,Power Door Locks,Trip Computer,Security System,Immobilizer,Cruise Control Steering Assist,Traction Control,Stability Control,Traction Control,Front Side Air Bag,Lane Departure Warning,Lane Keeping Assist,Lane Departure Warning,Front Collision Mitigation,Driver Monitoring,Tire Pressure Monitor,Driver Air Bag,Passenger Air Bag,Front Head Air Bag,Rear Head Air Bag,Passenger Air Bag Sensor,Front Side Air Bag,Rear Side Air Bag,Knee Air Bag,Child Safety Locks,Back-Up Camera

It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back! description: Experience unmatched efficiency and elegance with the 2025 Honda Accord Hybrid Touring, beautifully draped in Urban Gray Pearl. Glide through the streets with its sophisticated CVT transmission, harnessing the refined power of its 4-cylinder engine. Inside, sink into the sleek black interior that's designed to turn every journey into a luxurious escape.  CarFax No Accidents!  CarFax One Owner!     Popular Options and Features Include: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. description: 2025 Toyota Corolla Hybrid SE AWD CVT 1.8L DOHC 16V VVT 1.8L DOHC 16V VVT, 6 Speakers, 7" Digital Gauge Cluster, Black Badge Overlays (TMS), Blind Spot Monitor, Body Protection Package, Power Tilt/Slide Moonroof with Sliding Sunshade, Qi-Compatible Wireless Smartphone Charger, Radio: 10.5" Toyota Audio Multimedia, SE Premium Package, SiriusXM Trial Offering: 33 Months.If youre looking for a vehicle that delivers exceptional fuel efficiency, modern technology, and Toyotas legendary reliabilitywithout sacrificing style or driving enjoymentthe 2025 Toyota Corolla Hybrid SE deserves your full attention. This sedan represents the perfect balance between practicality and performance, making it an ideal choice for commuters, families, students, and anyone who wants to spend less time and money at the gas pump while enjoying a refined, confident ride.Toyota has spent decades perfecting hybrid technology, and the 2025 Corolla Hybrid SE is a shining example of how far that innovation has come. Its not just about fuel savingsthough those are impressiveits about creating a vehicle that feels responsive, comfortable, and well-equipped for todays drivers. From its sporty exterior design to its thoughtfully crafted interior and advanced safety systems, this Corolla Hybrid SE is engineered to exceed expectations in every category.The 2025 Corolla Hybrid SE stands out with a clean, athletic look that elevates it beyond the typical compact sedan. Toyotas designers have given the SE trim a sportier edge, ensuring it looks just as good parked in your driveway as it does cruising down the highway.Up front, the bold grille design and sharp LED headlights create a confident and modern presence. The sculpted hood and aerodynamic body lines arent just for showthey also help improve efficiency and handling. The SE trim adds unique styling cues, including sporty accents and eye-catching alloy wheels that enhance the cars dynamic profile.From every angle, the Corolla Hybrid SE looks refined yet energetic. Its compact size makes it easy to maneuver in tight city spaces, while its well-proportioned stance gives it a planted, stable feel on the road. Whether youre commuting to work, heading out for a weekend getaway, or running daily errands, this Corolla makes a strong visual statement without being over-the-top.Step inside the 2025 Corolla Hybrid SE, and youll find an interior designed around comfort, convenience, and intuitive technology. Toyota has carefully crafted the cabin to feel modern, welcoming, and practical, with high-quality materials and thoughtful details throughout.The sport-style front seats provide excellent support for daily driving and longer trips alike. The driving position is comfortable and ergonomic, with easy access to controls and clear visibility in all directions. Soft-touch materials, stylish trim accents, and a clean dashboard layout create a refined atmosphere that feels well above its class.Despite its compact exterior, the Corolla Hybrid SE offers impressive interior space. Both front and rear passengers can enjoy ample headroom and legroom, making it comfortable for adults in all seating positions. The rear seat easily accommodates passengers or folds down to expand cargo space when needed.The trunk provides generous room for groceries, luggage, or gear, making this Corolla just as practical as it is efficient. Whether youre hauling daily essentials or packing up for a road trip, this sedan is ready to adapt to your lifestyle.47/41 City/Highway MPGElgin Toyota serving the communities of Elgin, Bartlett, Hanover Park, Streamwood, Carol Stream, Glen Ellyn, Wheaton, Winfield, St Charles, Geneva, Westmont, Schaumburg, Arlington Height, West and East Dundee. description: Just arrived is this comfortable & feature-packed FACTORY FRESH, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, NONSMOKER 2025 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid SEL! ''The 2025 Hyundai Sonata is a stylish-looking sedan that boasts roomy seating and plenty of features for the money,'' Edmunds writes. The Hyundai Sonata Hybrid SEL starts at $31,000. It comes standard with 17-inch alloy wheels, LED headlights, heated side mirrors, laminated front side glass and a hands-free smart trunk lid. The interior features cloth upholstery, a leather-wrapped tilt-and-telescoping steering wheel with cruise and audio controls, an eight-way power-adjustable driver's seat, a four-way power-adjustable front passenger seat, a center rear armrest with cup holders, heated front seats, and 60/40-split-folding rear seats. A 4.2-inch instrument cluster display, a 12.3-inch touch screen, wireless device charging, satellite radio (subscription required), Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, Bluetooth, dual-zone automatic climate control, two USB ports in the front row, two USB charge-only ports in the second row, a 12-volt power outlet, proximity keyless entry, push-button start and the Hyundai Digital Key are also standard. ...and you can certainly bet there's a bunch more! You can view vehicle files above this description [on our site], which may include the original brochure and window sticker! Please note that in October 2025 Hyundai Motor America reacquired this vehicle due to customer complaints in regards to engine function. Regardless, in the interest of customer satisfaction, Hyundai agreed to repurchase the vehicle. We have all the documentation from Hyundai Motor America. BUY WITH CONFIDENCE AS THE FACTORY WARRANTY IS STILL INTACT! This is an exceptional opportunity to take this one home; don't hesitate or you will surely miss out! Enjoy new thinking and new possibilities with this 2025 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid available for THOUSANDS LESS than the price of a brand new one?! description: Discover the 2025 Mazda CX-30 AWD 2.5 S Preferred in sleek dark gray, offering the perfect blend of performance, technology, and comfort. Powered by a responsive SKYACTIV-G 2.5L I4 engine with 191hp and paired with a 6-speed shiftable automatic transmission, this compact SUV delivers confident all-wheel-drive handling for any road. Enjoy a premium driving experience with heated front seats, power-adjustable driver's seat with memory, leatherette upholstery, and a power glass moonroof. Stay connected and entertained with an 8.8-inch MAZDA CONNECT infotainment display, Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, Amazon Alexa, Bluetooth, and Wi-Fi hotspot capability. Safety is front and center with adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, blind spot monitoring, rear cross traffic alert, front automatic emergency braking with pedestrian detection, and a rearview camera. Additional features include rain-sensing wipers, dual-zone automatic climate control, push-button start, and a host of smart device app functions for remote engine start, lock/unlock, and maintenance scheduling. Experience the style, versatility, and innovation of the 2025 Mazda CX-30 today! description: Experience the perfect combination of style, performance, and technology with this White 2025 Mazda CX-5 AWD 2.5 S Select SUV. Equipped with a powerful and efficient SKYACTIV-G 2.5L I4 engine and advanced all-wheel drive, this CX-5 is ready for any road. Enjoy peace of mind with advanced safety features, including Front Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Keeping Assist, Blind Spot Monitoring, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, and Pedestrian Detection Pre-collision Warning. Stay connected with Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, a 10.25-inch MAZDA CONNECT infotainment screen, Bluetooth, and Wi-Fi hotspot capability. Comfort abounds with heated front seats, dual-zone automatic climate control, leatherette upholstery, power driver seat adjustments, and a premium leather-wrapped steering wheel. Convenience features include push-button start, adaptive cruise control, rain-sensing wipers, and a rearview camera. Smart device integration lets you schedule maintenance, locate your vehicle, and remotely start the engine via the MyMazda app. With its sleek design, LED headlights, and a suite of driver assistance features, this CX-5 Select is an exceptional choice for drivers seeking safety, luxury, and versatility. This Sierra 1500 SLT is a certified pre-owned vehicle, giving you the peace of mind that comes with a thorough inspection and comprehensive warranty coverage. You can trust that this truck has been meticulously maintained and is ready to take on your adventures.  Experience the exceptional capabilities and refined luxury of this 2025 GMC Sierra 1500 SLT. description: Discover the ultimate off-road companion in the 2025 Jeep Wrangler Rubicon. This iconic 4x4 is ready to conquer any terrain, with its powerful 2.0L I4 DOHC engine and 8-speed automatic transmission delivering exceptional performance and capability.  Tailored to your adventurous spirit, this Wrangler Rubicon boasts an impressive array of features, including:  - 8-Speed Automatic (850RE) with Adaptive Cruise Control and Selec-Speed Control - Body Color 3-Piece Hard Top - Freedom Panel Storage Bag - Firecracker Red Clearcoat Exterior - Traction Control, ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera, and Security System - Apple CarPlay and Android Auto Integration  The Rubicon package further enhances your off-road experience with specialized suspension, locking differentials, and skid plates, ensuring you can tackle the most challenging trails with confidence.  This Wrangler's impressive fuel efficiency, with 20 city and 22 highway MPG, means you can adventure farther without frequent stops. And with its iconic style and rugged good looks, this Jeep is sure to turn heads wherever the road (or trail) takes you.  Imagine the possibilities that await in this 2025 Jeep Wrangler Rubicon. With its uncompromising capability, advanced technology, and distinctive design, this vehicle is the ultimate expression of freedom and adventure.
